product.title: 2PCS Flawless Colour Changing Warm Skin Tone Foundation, Naturally Blends Moisturizing foundation makeup, Long Lasting Waterproof Lightweight Liquid Foundation SPF 15 for Face Makeup
featureBullets: REVOLUTIONARY NEW LIQUID FOUNDATION : Our face foundation contains skin beautifying, moisturizing and hydrating ingredients, which can match your skin tone, maintain luster throughout the day, cover fine lines and wrinkles, and will not crease, crack or condense, and nude makeup can make the skin shine .
SPF 15 : This white foundation cream has full coverage and contains SPF 15, which can protect your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays.

IMPROVED COLOR TONE : The unique formula can protect and moisturize the skin, make the skin tone even, the natural liquid foundation can cover dark circles, minimize pores and skin blemishes or uneven skin tone, and present a natural skin tone.
LIGHTWEIGHT AND FULL COVERAGE : Designed for daily use, this color match foundation provides a silky glow to your face. Adapt to your skin tone and texture to get the effect of real skin.
NO CRUELTY BEAUTY : This acne concealer cover cream provides a seamless, flawless camouflage, smooth effect. Will not dry or agglomerate.
product.description: BEST FACE FORWARD: Our high-performing, skin-perfecting foundation can corrects and perfects skin imperfections such as uneven skin tone and under eye circles. Provides seamless, flawless camouflage in ultra-smooth finish. LAST ALL DAY: The lightweight, yet high-impact coverage formula glides onto the skin for a flawless finish that lasts 24-hour. LIGHT and MOISTURIZING: This carefully flawless finish foundation contains Hydrating Serum. It provides lightweight coverage while also keep your face moisturized. SIMPLE TO USE: The pump foundation bottle makes application easy, whether you use a blending sponge, makeup brush, or your fingers.

specification.value: #49,148 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #415 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers praise the foundation's lightweight, smooth texture, and natural appearance, with one noting it goes on smoothly without streaking or looking cakey. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its quality and perfect color match. However, customers disagree on how well it matches their skin tone and provides coverage.

reviews.reviewTitle: This product performs exactly as advertised
reviews.reviewText: I'm 68 years old. As you can see in my photo this Foundation makes me look much younger. Most foundation makeups for my age are heavy. They feel and look like I'm wearing a mask. Other products actually make my skin look older.Tum remarkably turns back time. It's usually a difficult process to find the color that matches my skin tone perfectly. There's nothing that makes you look older than Foundation lines and make up that drys your skin. Tum Foundation Color Changing makeup adjusts the color to match your skin tone perfectly. Some days my skin has more red tones in it . That is no problem, Tum adjusts automatically. Other days my skin has a more sallow color with greenish tinge. Tum automatically corrects the color. It almost seems like magic. It really creates a naked natural look that lasts all day. My skin looks flawless as if it was lit from within. It makes my complexion perfectly flawless . I don't have to worry about sweat or rain destroying the look.Tum is waterproof. While it is moisturizing on its own, if you apply a good face cream as a base it enhances the creamy texture of your skin. This makeup finish has an SPF of 15. I find that it works outstandingly for me . The price is a bargain in comparison to other comparable products. My skin looks sheer and smooth. I'll definitely be buying this again and again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 4, 2022

reviews.reviewTitle: poor coverage but actually color changes to my tone!
reviews.reviewText: i like that it actually color changes to my skin tone, & the texture isn’t bad either. it’s not heavy or cakey feeling, it feels good applying it as well. but my complaint is that there isn’t much for coverage. i struggle with acne & have searched endlessly for a foundation that applies nicely & actually has coverage to it & lasts. unfortunately for me specifically this does not have even half of the coverage i need. & it definitely doesn’t last near the hours it says it can on the bottle. bummed i bought the 2 pack because i likely won’t be using it any longer.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 9, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Blended well but it took a bit to get there
reviews.reviewText: I don't know how to feel just yet. I tried some on my hand with no lotion under (a little flaky) it took a lot of rubbing but it started to blend with my skin tone ( i was beginning to worry). It is still a little lighter than what I am, and due to medication I have a lot of redness on my face. So that will be interesting to see. I may have to add a little of my dark foundation to it when I use it but still debating. The longer its on my hand and the yellow lighting of course makes it look perfect. Overall I do like the fact that it changes to your pigmentation so it take out the guessing in "what shade am i" since I can never gwt it right. I don't wear makeup unless it's a special occasion so why not.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 2, 2025
